reports.summary: 本轮按严格的新颖性和相关性标准检索后，没有发现自上次成功运行以来新增且足够相关的灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作条目。我们继续检查了 arXiv、公开项目页和相关研究页面，但最近的近邻候选要么首次公开早于上次运行时间，要么没有把灵巧手或灵巧操作作为核心贡献，因此未纳入。

I rechecked arXiv, public project pages, and related research pages, but the nearest candidates were either first public before the prior run time or did not make dexterous hands central enough to qualify.

reports.summary: 本轮按严格的新颖性与相关性标准检索后，没有发现自上次成功运行以来新增且足够相关的灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作条目。我们继续优先检查 arXiv、项目页、实验室与公司研究主页、代码仓库和相关公开页面，但本次看到的候选项要么发布时间早于 2026-07-17，要么灵巧手/灵巧操作并非核心贡献，因此未纳入。
reports.summary_en: After a strict novelty and relevance check, no newly relevant dexterous robot hand or dexterous manipulation item was found since the last successful run. We continued to prioritize arXiv, project pages, lab and company research sites, code repositories, and other public sources, but the candidates seen in this run were either published before 2026-07-17 or did not make dexterous hands or dexterous manipulation central enough to qualify.

reports.summary: 本轮按严格时序与相关性筛选后，只发现 1 项真正新增且足够相关的条目：`MIDAS Hand`。它在 2026-07-16 首次公开，是一个低成本、开源、带触觉感知的类人尺度灵巧手，并同时公开了控制、触觉 API、仿真、重定向和遥操作工具链，明显符合“灵巧手是核心贡献”的收录标准。其余看似相关的工作要么早于上次成功运行的时间戳，要么不够满足严格的新颖性条件，因此未纳入。
reports.summary_en: This run found 1 genuinely new and sufficiently relevant item since the prior successful run: `MIDAS Hand`. It was first public on 2026-07-16 and presents a low-cost, open-source, human-scale dexterous hand with tactile sensing, plus a released stack for control, tactile APIs, simulation, retargeting, and teleoperation. Other candidate papers I checked were either earlier than the last successful run timestamp or did not meet the strict novelty bar, so they were excluded.

reports.summary: 本轮按严格标准检索后，没有发现自上次成功运行以来新增且足够相关的灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作条目。我们继续优先检查 arXiv、项目页、实验室与公司研究主页，以及相关代码仓库，并排除了发布时间更早、重复公告或灵巧手并非核心贡献的近似结果。
reports.summary_en: After a strict search, no newly relevant dexterous robot hand or dexterous manipulation item was found since the last successful run. We continued to prioritize arXiv, project pages, lab and company research sites, and related code repositories, while excluding earlier items, duplicate announcements, and near-miss results that did not make dexterous hands central enough.

reports.summary_en: After a strict search, no newly relevant dexterous robot hand or dexterous manipulation item was found since the last successful run. We continued to prioritize arXiv, project pages, lab and company research sites, and related code repositories, while excluding earlier items, duplicate announcements, and near-miss results that did not make dexterous hands central enough.

reports.summary: 本轮检索到 1 项新的高相关工作：`TactiDex: A Real-World Tactile-Guided Benchmark for Human-Like Dexterous Manipulation`。它把真实世界触觉引导基准、同步多模态数据与触觉驱动迁移框架结合起来，明确以灵巧操作和人类式接触为核心贡献，符合本追踪器的严格收录标准。
reports.summary_en: This run found 1 newly relevant item: `TactiDex: A Real-World Tactile-Guided Benchmark for Human-Like Dexterous Manipulation`. It combines a real-world tactile-guided benchmark, synchronized multimodal data, and a tactile-driven transfer framework, with dexterous manipulation and human-like contact as the core contribution, which fits the tracker’s strict inclusion bar.

reports.summary: 本轮按严格标准检索后，没有发现自上次成功运行以来新增且足够相关的灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作条目。我们继续优先检查 arXiv、项目页、实验室与公司研究主页，以及相关代码仓库，并排除了发布时间更早、重复公告或灵巧手并非核心贡献的近似结果。
reports.summary_en: After a strict search, no newly relevant dexterous robot hand or dexterous manipulation item was found since the last successful run. We continued to prioritize arXiv, project pages, lab and company research pages, and related code repositories, while excluding earlier items, duplicate announcements, and near-miss results that did not make dexterous hands central enough.

reports.summary: 本轮按严格标准检索后，没有发现自上次成功运行以来新增且足够相关的灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作条目。我们继续优先检查 arXiv、项目页和相关研究主页，并把明显不以灵巧手为核心的近似条目排除在外。
reports.summary_en: After a strict search, no newly relevant dexterous robot hand or dexterous manipulation item was found since the last successful run. We continued to prioritize arXiv, project pages, and related research sites, while excluding nearby items that did not make dexterous hands central enough.

reports.summary: 本轮检索到 2 项新的高相关工作，均在 2026-07-09 之后首次公开，并且都把灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作作为核心贡献。优先级最高的是大规模多任务、多具身灵巧操作基准 `DexVerse`，其次是面向多种灵巧手的无标定重定向方法 `AnyDexRT`；两者都值得继续跟踪代码、项目页和更完整的实机验证。
reports.summary_en: This run found 2 newly relevant items published after the 2026-07-09 cutoff, and both make dexterous robot hands or dexterous manipulation central to the contribution. The top item is `DexVerse`, a large-scale multi-task, multi-embodiment benchmark, followed by `AnyDexRT`, a calibration-free retargeting method for multiple dexterous hands; both are worth tracking for code, project pages, and fuller real-world validation.

reports.summary: 本轮按严格标准检索后，没有发现自上次成功运行以来新增且足够相关的灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作条目。我们继续优先检查 arXiv、项目页和相关研究主页，并严格排除了发布时间早于上次截止时间、以及灵巧手并非核心贡献的近似条目。
reports.summary_en: After a strict search, no newly relevant dexterous robot hand or dexterous manipulation item was found since the previous successful run. We continued to prioritize arXiv, project pages, and related research sites, while excluding nearby items that were either published before the previous cutoff or did not make dexterous hands central enough.

reports.summary: 本轮检索到 2 项新的高相关工作，均在 2026-07-07 之后公开，并且都把灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作作为核心贡献。优先级最高的是面向真实灵巧手学习的 `LAMP`，其次是强调双臂灵巧遥操作与力控的 `DexTele-0`；两者都值得继续跟踪代码、项目页和实机结果。
reports.summary_en: This run found 2 newly relevant items published after the 2026-07-07 cutoff. The top item is `LAMP`, which focuses on real-world learning for dexterous hand manipulation, and the second is `DexTele-0`, which centers on force-aware bimanual dexterous teleoperation; both are worth tracking for code, project pages, and fuller robot validation.

reports.summary: 本轮检索到 2 项新的高相关工作，均在 2026-07-05 上次成功运行之后公开，并且都把灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作作为核心贡献。优先级最高的是面向五指灵巧手力控抓取与操作的零样本仿真到真实部署工作，其次是以分割掩码作为 sim-to-real 桥接的灵巧世界模型；两者都符合本追踪器的严格收录标准。
reports.summary_en: This run found 2 newly relevant items published after the last successful run on 2026-07-05, and both make dexterous robot hands or dexterous manipulation central to the contribution. The top item focuses on zero-shot sim-to-real deployment for five-finger force-based grasping and manipulation, and the second uses segmentation masks as a sim-to-real bridge for a dexterous world model; both meet the tracker’s strict inclusion bar.

reports.summary: 本轮没有发现自 2026-07-05 上次成功运行以来新增且足够相关的灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作工作。已检查 arXiv、项目页及相关公开页面；一些看似接近的条目要么发布时间早于上一轮截止时间，要么灵巧手并非核心贡献，因此未纳入。
reports.summary_en: No newly relevant dexterous robot hand or dexterous manipulation work was found since the last successful run on 2026-07-05. arXiv, project pages, and related public sources were checked; nearby items were excluded because they were either earlier than the previous cutoff or did not make dexterous hands central enough to qualify.

reports.summary: 本轮检索到 1 项新的高相关工作：`Imagining the Sense of Touch: Touch-Informed Manipulation via Imagined Tactile Representations`。它把“想象触觉”用于接触丰富的灵巧操作，在不依赖真实触觉硬件的前提下，利用视觉和本体感觉生成触觉表征，并在仿真与真实机器人任务上验证了收益。
reports.summary_en: This run found 1 newly relevant item: `Imagining the Sense of Touch: Touch-Informed Manipulation via Imagined Tactile Representations`. It applies imagined tactile representations to contact-rich dexterous manipulation, generating tactile cues from vision and proprioception without physical tactile hardware, and validates the approach in simulation and real-world robot tasks.

reports.summary: 本轮检索到 1 项新的高相关工作：`VT-WAM: Visual-Tactile World Action Model for Contact-Rich Manipulation`。它把视觉、触觉变形预测与动作预测统一到同一模型中，直接面向接触丰富的灵巧操作，并在 6 个真实任务上报告了明显优于已有方法的结果。
reports.summary_en: This run found 1 newly relevant item: `VT-WAM: Visual-Tactile World Action Model for Contact-Rich Manipulation`. It unifies visual prediction, tactile deformation prediction, and action prediction for contact-rich dexterous manipulation, and reports strong gains over prior methods on six real-world tasks.

reports.summary: 本轮检索到 1 项新的高相关工作：`Imagining the Sense of Touch: Touch-Informed Manipulation via Imagined Tactile Representations`。它把想象触觉直接用于接触丰富的灵巧操作，并提供了方法、基准与真实机器人验证，符合本追踪器的严格收录标准。
reports.summary_en: This run found 1 newly relevant item: `Imagining the Sense of Touch: Touch-Informed Manipulation via Imagined Tactile Representations`. It directly uses imagined tactile representations for contact-rich dexterous manipulation and includes a method, benchmark, and real-robot validation, which fits the tracker’s strict inclusion bar.

reports.summary: 本轮未发现自上次成功运行以来新增且足够相关的灵巧手/灵巧操作工作；为避免重复和误报，本次不新增条目。
reports.summary_en: No newly relevant dexterous-hand or dexterous-manipulation work was found since the previous successful run, so no items were added.

reports.summary: 本轮发现 3 项与灵巧机器人手直接相关的新进展，覆盖新硬件、数据/代码套件和低成本灵巧手内操作方案。
reports.summary_en: This run found three new items directly related to dexterous robot hands, covering new hardware, a data/code suite, and a low-cost in-hand manipulation solution.

reports.summary: 本轮发现 3 项与灵巧机器人手直接相关的新进展，分别聚焦自动化灵巧抓取数据采集、双手灵巧遥操作，以及面向连续灵巧人形机动操作的协调策略。
reports.summary_en: This run surfaced three new items directly relevant to dexterous robot hands: automated dexterous grasping data collection, bimanual dexterous teleoperation, and coordinated policies for continuous dexterous humanoid loco-manipulation.

reports.summary: 本轮发现 4 项与灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作直接相关的新条目，覆盖新型灵巧手关节、接触感知内操作、长时程灵巧操作推理，以及来自日常人类视频的数据构建。
reports.summary_en: This run found four new items directly relevant to dexterous robot hands or dexterous manipulation, covering a new dexterous-hand joint, contact-aware in-hand manipulation, long-horizon dexterous manipulation reasoning, and dataset construction from everyday human videos.

reports.summary: 本轮检索发现 1 项新的高相关条目：一篇面向共体式可穿戴机器人手的变量自主权方法论文。它把人机共享单一物理身体、在不同任务阶段切换自主等级作为核心贡献，且包含真实用户研究与量化结果，因此属于本轮最值得跟踪的新增进展。
reports.summary_en: This run found 1 newly relevant item: a paper on variable autonomy for a co-embodied wearable robotic hand. It makes human-robot co-embodiment over a single physical body the central contribution, and it includes a real user study with quantitative results, so it is the most important new item to track in this run.

reports.summary: 本轮检索到 1 项新的高相关工作：`VibeAct`，它把振动信号用于接触丰富的反应式灵巧操作控制，主题与灵巧机器人手直接相关，且发布时间晚于上一轮成功运行，因此应作为新增条目收录。整体来看，本轮没有发现大量新文献，但这项工作在触觉感知与灵巧操作闭环控制之间建立了清晰连接，值得继续跟进其后续代码与实机结果。
reports.summary_en: This run found 1 newly relevant item: `VibeAct`, which uses vibration signals for contact-rich reactive robot dexterity. It is directly aligned with dexterous robot hands and was published after the previous successful run, so it should be added as a new item. No broad wave of new papers appeared in this run, but this work is notable because it connects tactile sensing to closed-loop dexterous manipulation in a concrete way.

reports.summary: 本轮未发现自上次成功运行以来新增且足够相关的灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作工作。检索中虽然能看到一些与触觉、抓握或机器人操作相关的近期信息，但它们要么发布时间早于上一轮已收录内容，要么并未满足“灵巧手/灵巧操作必须是核心贡献”的严格标准，因此本次不新增条目。
reports.summary_en: This run did not surface any newly relevant dexterous robot hand or dexterous manipulation work since the previous successful run. Some recent items around tactile sensing, grasping, or robot manipulation appeared in search results, but they were either earlier than already tracked content or did not meet the strict bar that dexterous hands or dexterous manipulation must be central contributions, so no items were added.

reports.summary: 本轮发现 1 项新的高相关工作：`Play2Perfect`。它把多指灵巧手的“玩耍式预训练”与精密装配直接连接起来，围绕抓取、手内重定向和位姿到达学习可复用的操作先验，并给出明显的样本效率提升和零样本仿真到真实转移结果，因此值得新增收录。
reports.summary_en: This run found 1 newly relevant item: `Play2Perfect`. It directly connects dexterous play pretraining for multi-finger hands to precise assembly, learns reusable manipulation priors for grasping, in-hand reorientation, and pose reaching, and reports strong sample-efficiency gains plus zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, so it should be added.

reports.summary: 本轮未发现自上次成功运行以来新增且足够相关的灵巧机器人手/灵巧操作工作，因此不新增条目。检索中出现了一些看似接近的近期论文，但它们要么早于上一轮截止时间，要么灵巧手并非核心贡献，所以被排除。
reports.summary_en: This run did not find any newly relevant dexterous robot hand or dexterous manipulation work since the last successful run, so no items were added. Some nearby recent papers appeared in search, but they were either published before the previous cutoff or did not make dexterous hands central enough to qualify.

reports.summary: 本轮继续严格检索灵巧机器人手与灵巧操作方向的最新公开内容，但未发现自上次成功运行以来新增且足够相关的条目，因此不新增收录。检索中看到了若干六月下旬的相关论文与项目，但它们要么早于上一轮截止时间，要么灵巧手并非核心贡献。
reports.summary_en: This run continued a strict search for the latest public work on dexterous robot hands and dexterous manipulation, but it did not find any newly relevant item since the last successful run, so nothing was added. Several late-June papers and projects appeared in search, but they were either earlier than the previous cutoff or not central enough on dexterous hands to qualify.

reports.summary: 本轮按严格标准检索后，没有发现自上一轮成功运行以来新增且足够相关的灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作条目，因此不新增收录。
reports.summary_en: After a strict search, this run did not find any newly relevant dexterous robot hand or dexterous manipulation item since the previous successful run, so nothing was added.

reports.summary: 本轮检索到 1 项新的高相关工作：`Human-Centric Transferable Tactile Pre-Training for Dexterous Robotic Manipulation`。它把人类中心触觉预训练直接用于灵巧机器人操作，公开信息充分，值得新增收录。
reports.summary_en: This run found 1 newly relevant item: `Human-Centric Transferable Tactile Pre-Training for Dexterous Robotic Manipulation`. It directly applies human-centric tactile pre-training to dexterous robot manipulation, and the public information is sufficient to add it.
